title: event — tenancy hooks
description: This module is tenant-aware and participates in tenancy + facility lifecycle. Two hooks: prevent orphans on tenant erasure, and cascade event_facilities cleanup on facility retirement.

reference.hierarchy_note: See hierarchy.md §12 for tenancy-lifecycle vs domain-event separation.

hooks.purpose: Runs BEFORE tenancy's FK cascade drops the tenant. Iterates every Event on the tenant + verifies no active inbound reference remains (Session.event_id, EventTeam.event_id, athlete_enrollment references — Wave 3+). When any inbound reference exists, logs a diagnostic in the tenancy erasure report. Does NOT rehome Events to another tenant. The actual DELETE fires afterward via the tenant_id FK CASCADE + event_facilities cascades via CASCADE FK.

Fires when a Facility is retired (facility module Wave 2). Cascades: finds active event_facilities rows referencing the retired facility. For each: fire EventFacilityRemoved + soft-delete the pivot row + emit a warning to the event's admin via the event.venue_changed notification (cannot-opt-out) so the tenant reroutes the event to another facility. Does NOT auto-cancel the event — the tenant decides whether to reschedule, relocate, or cancel.

notes: `hooks.json` and `listeners.json` are BOTH legitimate. Hooks are tenancy-lifecycle-specific + participate in the tenancy transaction; listeners are general domain-event subscribers.
See .kiro/steering/hierarchy.md §12 for the split between bootstrappers (per-request tenant switch) and hooks (lifecycle events).
